templates_library_form_carousel_min_card: At least 2 media cards are required.

templates_library_delete_subtitle: Are you sure you want to delete this template? This action cannot be undone.
templates_library_header_subtitle: Add an optional header to your template to make it stand out.
templates_library_header_max_chars: Max 60 characters. Variables are not allowed in headers.
templates_library_body_subtitle: This is the main content of your message. Use {{1}} to add variables.
templates_library_variable_meta_review_t: Provide realistic examples for Meta's review process.
templates_library_basic_info_template_na: Lowercase letters, numbers and underscores only.
templates_library_basic_info_language_hi: The language this template is written in.
templates_library_basic_info_sector_hint: Industry sector this template belongs to.
templates_library_basic_info_category_hi: Specific use-case within the selected sector.
templates_library_basic_info_whatsapp_ca: Classify your template based on its primary purpose.
templates_library_basic_info_marketing_t: Choose the type of marketing experience to deliver.
templates_library_basic_info_offer_text_: This text will be displayed prominently alongside the expiration timer.
templates_library_carousel_products_subt: Add up to 10 product cards to your carousel.
templates_library_carousel_product_heade: The product image is linked via the product catalog dynamically.
templates_library_carousel_min_product_c: At least 2 product cards are required.
templates_library_footer_subtitle: Add a small footer text at the bottom of your message.
templates_library_footer_max_chars: Footer text is limited to 60 characters.
templates_library_auth_subtitle: Configure the OTP button, security message, and expiry time below.
templates_library_auth_body_hint: Use {{1}} for the OTP code and {{2}} for expiry minutes.
templates_library_auth_body_placeholder: Your verification code is {{1}}. Valid for {{2}} minutes.
templates_library_auth_button_text_hint: The text shown on the OTP action button.
templates_library_auth_otp_length_hint: Number of digits in the OTP (4–8).
templates_library_auth_expiry_hint: How long the code remains valid (1–90).
templates_library_auth_security_recommen: Appends "For your security, do not share this code." to the message.
templates_library_auth_footer_hint: Shown in small text below the message body.
templates_library_buttons_subtitle: Add interactive buttons to your message to drive engagement.
templates_library_preview_catalog_desc: Browse pictures and details of our offerings.
templates_library_preview_otp_subtitle: Tap to copy your one-time code
templates_library_preview_security_recom: For your security, do not share this code.
templates_library_preview_disclaimer: This is just a preview. The actual message may appear differently.
templates_library_form_call_permission_i: This template will include a call_permission flag in its payload, requesting the recipient's opt-in for phone calls. No additional configuration needed — just compose your message body above.
manage_profile_page_description: Update your personal information and security settings.
personal_information_desc: Update your account details and contact information.
note_placeholder: Add a brief note about yourself...

password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters long
